description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: unincorporated community in Madison County, Texas
seat of Harris County, and largest city in State of Texas, United States
description_wiki: Houston (  HEW-stən) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Texas and the Southern United States.

description: city in and county seat of Montgomery County, Texas, United States
description_wiki: Conroe is a city in and the county seat of Montgomery County, Texas, United States, about 40 miles (64 km) north of Houston.

description: United States Army installation located in North Central Kansas
description_wiki: Fort Riley is a United States Army installation located in North Central Kansas, on the Kansas River, also known as the Kaw, between Junction City and Manhattan.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Kansas (  KAN-zəss) is a landlocked state in the Midwestern region of the United States.

surface_forms: Fort Bliss in El Paso, Texas
description: census designated place in Texas, United States
description_wiki: Fort Bliss is a United States Army post in New Mexico and Texas, with its headquarters in El Paso, Texas.

description: city in and county seat of El Paso County, Texas, United States
description_wiki: El Paso (English:  ; Spanish: [el ˈpaso] , lit. 'the route' or 'the pass') is a city in and the county seat of El Paso County, Texas, United States.

surface_forms: Troop G of the 7th Calvary Regiment
description: United States Army cavalry regiment
description_wiki: The 7th Cavalry Regiment is a United States Army cavalry regiment formed in 1866.

description: US Army facility in Pittsburg, California
description_wiki: Camp Stoneman was a United States Army facility located in Pittsburg, California.

description: country in Oceania
description_wiki: Australia, officially the Commonwealth of Australia, is a country comprising the mainland of the Australian continent, the island of Tasmania and numerous smaller islands.

description: capital city of Queensland, Australia
description_wiki: Brisbane (  BRIZ-bən; Turrbal/Yagara: Meanjin) is the capital and largest city of the Australian state of Queensland and the third-most populous city in Australia, with a population of approximately 2.8 million.

description: island country in the southwest Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: New Zealand is an island country in the southwestern Pacific Ocean.

description: capital city of New South Wales, Australia
description_wiki: Sydney is the capital city of the state of New South Wales, and is the most populous city in Australia.

description: island in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: New Guinea (Tok Pisin: Niugini; Hiri Motu: Niu Gini; Indonesian: Papua, fossilized Nugini, also known as Papua or historically Irian) is the world's second-largest island, with an area of 785,753 km2 (303,381 sq mi).

description: cargo ships built in the United States during World War II
description_wiki: Liberty ships are a class of cargo ship built in the United States during World War II under the Emergency Shipbuilding Program.

description: city in Queensland, Australia
description_wiki: Townsville is a city on the north-eastern coast of Queensland, Australia.

description: island sovereign state in Oceania
description_wiki: Solomon Islands, also known simply as the Solomons, is an archipelagic country consisting of six major islands and over 1,000 smaller islands in Melanesia, Oceania, to the north-east of Australia.

description: archipelagic country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

description: archipelago in the South Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: The Admiralty Islands are an archipelago group of 40 islands in the Bismarck Archipelago, to the north of New Guinea in the South Pacific Ocean.

description: 1917-1968 United States Army formation
description_wiki: The 31st Chemical Brigade is an Army National Guard CBRN brigade.

description: type of torpedo-armed fast attack craft
description_wiki: A PT boat (short for patrol torpedo boat) is a motor torpedo boat used by the United States Navy in World War II.  These vessels were small, fast, and inexpensive to build, and were valued for their maneuverability and speed.
